coupon.source_phrase_block: Pass admits up to four people at $5.00 off each. Children under five and active military are free. For museum hours, exhibits, and directions please visit the Concord Museum's website: https://concordmuseum.org/ This pass can be picked up the day before (if available) or day of reservation. This pass must be returned to the library by opening on the day after use.
